name: team-haiku-fanout-test
description: Wider fan-out stress test — 10 work items distributed across 5 haiku agents (round-robin → 2 items each). Cheap variant that exercises the distribute_agent_assign code path with a non-trivial slot count, using haiku to keep cost minimal.

steps.command: echo '## Haiku Fan-out Test' && echo 'Items: 10, Agents: 5, expected distribution: 2+2+2+2+2' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/haiku-fanout-summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq '.' && echo '' && echo 'Collected:' && find .wheel/outputs/haiku-fanout-results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
